statement: In every magma, Equation 2171 (`x = ((y * z) * x) * (z * z)`) implies Equation 4005 (`x * y = (z * (y * x)) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0243
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y z) x) (op z z))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x y) = (op (op z (op y x)) x)
